title: Academic Operations
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Academic Operations
The Academic Operations Office is an integral team within Academic Affairs, committed to supporting the academic success of teaching and learning at NYU Shanghai. It serves as the backbone for managing undergraduate textbooks and course materials, provides comprehensive administrative support for teaching, and coordinates academic projects such as course scheduling, course feedback evaluations, capstone funding applications, and capstone inspections. Additionally, the team organizes flagship academic events, including the Undergraduate Research Symposium and the Senior Awards Ceremony.

Office Hours：Monday to Friday 9am to 12pm and 1pm to 5pm (except holidays)
